scripts.build: tsc -b && vite build && mkdir -p dist/functions dist/lib && cp -R functions/. dist/functions && cp -R lib/. dist/lib
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 execute RESUME_DB --local --file=./migrations/0001_resume_drafts.sql && wrangler d1 execute RESUME_DB --local --file=./migrations/0002_users_and_secure_drafts.sql && wrangler d1 execute RESUME_DB --local --file=./migrations/0003_profile_fields.sql
scripts.db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 execute RESUME_DB --remote --file=./migrations/0001_resume_drafts.sql && wrangler d1 execute RESUME_DB --remote --file=./migrations/0002_users_and_secure_drafts.sql && wrangler d1 execute RESUME_DB --remote --file=./migrations/0003_profile_fields.sql
